calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Parties appeared in Dept. 303 both sides in propria persona.
Judge: Julie Tang
Clerk: D. Feinberg

Issue of untimely notice of appeal is resolved to the court's satisfaction in defendant's favor upon proof made to the court.

Trial de novo proceeds. Following evidence and testimony, the court takes the case under submission as of this day May 13, 2009
